task_text: Put together an agenda for next week's Q3 kickoff meeting. The meeting is 90 minutes and should cover the most important topics for the team to align on before Q3 starts. Save it as q3_kickoff_agenda.txt.

input.content:
Q3 Kickoff Meeting Agenda
Duration: 90 minutes

1. Welcome & Q2 Retrospective (15 minutes)
   - Celebrate Q2 wins and key milestones
   - Discuss lessons learned and areas for improvement

2. Q3 Goals & OKRs (25 minutes)
   - Review high-level company and department goals for Q3
   - Breakdown of specific team targets and KPIs
   - Ensure alignment on expectations and primary focus areas

3. Key Strategic Initiatives (20 minutes)
   - Overview of major projects starting in Q3
   - Key milestones and timelines
   - Identify cross-functional dependencies and risks

4. Team Structure & Capacity (10 minutes)
   - Role updates and resource allocation
   - Review tools and support needed for Q3 success

5. Q&A and Open Discussion (15 minutes)
   - Address team questions and concerns
   - Open floor for feedback and ideas

6. Next Steps & Action Items (5 minutes)
   - Assign owners to immediate action items
   - Wrap-up and final remarks

content.text: I have created the agenda for the 90-minute Q3 kickoff meeting and saved it to the file `q3_kickoff_agenda.txt`. It includes a breakdown of important topics such as a Q2 retrospective, Q3 Goals & OKRs, strategic initiatives, and time for team Q&A.
